description: Python web handler with a SQL injection vulnerability via string formatting.
diff:
--- a/app/handlers.py
+++ b/app/handlers.py
@@ -1,3 +1,15 @@
+import sqlite3
+from flask import Flask, request
+
+app = Flask(__name__)
+
+@app.route('/users')
+def get_users():
+    name = request.args.get('name', '')
+    conn = sqlite3.connect('app.db')
+    cursor = conn.cursor()
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{name}'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return str(cursor.fetchall())
